sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name CLOB, value NUMERIC DEFAULT 0, created_at TIMESTAMP);

SELECT sys.group_concat(name) FROM (SELECT name, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND created_at >= '2023-01-01' GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(*) > 0) AS subquery GROUP BY value HAVING MAX(value) > 15;
SELECT sys.group_concat(name) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND (sys.group_concat(name) = '') OR (value = 20.5);
SELECT id, sys.group_concat(name) OVER (PARTITION BY value ORDER BY created_at) AS concatenated_names FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL OR id IN (1, 3);

SELECT sys.group_concat(name) FROM (SELECT name, value FROM test_table HAVING name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(name) < 5) AS nested WHERE nested.value = all (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL);
SELECT name FROM test_table t1 JOIN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL) t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE sys.group_concat(name) = 'test4';
SELECT sys.group_concat(name) AS concatenated FROM test_table WHERE created_at = (SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM test_table WHERE value > 15) AND name IS NOT NULL;
SELECT CASE WHEN sys.group_concat(name) IS NULL THEN 'No Names' ELSE 'Names Exist' END AS status FROM test_table WHERE value BETWEEN 0 AND 25;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_test (uid INT, description CLOB NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO temp_test (uid, description) VALUES (1, 'Temporary test entry'), (2, NULL), (3, 'Another entry');
SELECT sys.group_concat(description) FROM temp_test WHERE description IS NOT NULL GROUP BY uid HAVING COUNT(uid) > 1;
